Class GitHubProvider

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.jissuesystem.api.AbstractTokenProvider
dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github.GitHubProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
IIssueProvider
public class GitHubProvider extends AbstractTokenProvider implements IIssueProvider
GitHub issue provider implementation for the IIssueProvider interface.

Supports:

  • Fetching all labels of a repository via /labels endpoint
  • Reporting issues via the repository_dispatch event

Example usage: 

IIssueProvider provider = new GitHubProvider("owner", "repo", "PAT");
Set<Label> labels = provider.fetchLabels().join();
HttpResponse<String> response = provider.report(issue).join();
Since:
0.2.0
